Dear Store Team,

Thank you for reaching out. Your complaint has been registered successfully. Please find the details below:

Complaint No{{ $('Generate Complaint No').first().json.complaintno }}
Store{{ $('Generate Complaint No').first().json.p.storeName }} ({{ $('Generate Complaint No').first().json.p.storeCode }})
Product{{ $('Generate Complaint No').first().json.p.productName }}
Expected Closure{{ $('Generate Complaint No').first().json.p.edcStr }}

Our team will follow up within the expected closure date. Please reply to this email or call us if you need immediate assistance.

Automated response from VMM CRM — Open Mind Services Limited.
